statements.sql: select sum("amount") as aggregate from "transactions" where "status" = 'completed'
select sum("amount") as aggregate from "transactions" where "status" = 'completed' and "created_at" between '2025-12-01 00:00:00' and '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
select sum("amount") as aggregate from "transactions" where "status" = 'completed' and "created_at" between '2025-11-01 00:00:00' and '2025-11-30 23:59:59'
select count(*) as aggregate from "users" where "created_at" between '2025-12-01 00:00:00' and '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'active'
select * from "product_prices" where "product_prices"."id" in ('01KBB0E29F27VS03KR5BRF3KXV', '01KBB0ESRKETG8SPEG5QPWNNHD') and "product_prices"."deleted_at" is null
select count(*) as aggregate from "orders" where "orders"."deleted_at" is null
